name: OnIpsecSadbAcquire
title: OnIpsecSadbAcquire
syntax: void OnIpsecSadbAcquire(ip_Endpoint source, ip_Endpoint destination, long policyHandle);
description: Get a parameter from a security policy record.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Source endpoint for which the security association is acquired.

parameters.name: destination
parameters.description: Destination endpoint for which the security association is acquired.

parameters.name: policyHandle
parameters.description: Handle to the security policy which caused the acquire callback.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
